speaker: speaker1
text: Good morning . What's the matter with you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Good morning , doctor . I have a terrible headache .

speaker: speaker1
text: All right , young man . Tell me how it got started .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yesterday I had a runny nose . Now my nose is stuffed up . I have a sore throat . And I ’ m afraid I've got a temperature . I feel terrible .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don't worry , young man . Lat me give you an examination . First let me take a look at your throat . Open your mouth and say'ah ' .

speaker: speaker1
text: Your throat is inflamed . And your tongue is heavily coated . You have all the symptoms of influenza .

speaker: speaker2
text: What am I supposed to do then ?

speaker: speaker1
text: A good rest is all you need , and drink more water . I'll write you a prescription .
